title: Nether Flask
description: A recharging Flask that holds a Potion of choice!
body: The Nether Flask is an item that can be bound to any Potion of choice, effectively mimicking that Potion. It can be obtained using a Nether Star and Clay Blocks (Obtaining a Nether Star will unlock an advancement which grants access to all recipes). At first the Flask is weak. It can be upgraded using Flask Shards and Bone Dust(Duration and amounts of uses), which are obtained either through Pyramids, Buried Treasure, Broken Portals and a few other loot chests, such as Mineshafts. #### The Flask is recharged by standing in the vicinity of a Stardust Campfire! The Mod is fully translatable. The Mod can be configured via nether-flask.json (Duration Modifiers, Maximum Uses, Maximum Strength) in the Config Folder of your game! If you encounter any issues, please contact me via [Discord](https://discord.gg/s4gSJvVuq3 )
